headline: 1 Oversold Stock Primed to Rebound and 2 We Find Risky
summary: The past year hasn’t been kind to the stocks featured in this article. Each has tumbled to its lowest point in 12 months, leaving investors to decide whether they’re witnessing fire sales or falling knives.
